2604.27387.title: Robust Learning on Heterogeneous Graphs with Heterophily: A Graph Structure Learning Approach
2604.27387.paper_summary: Heterogeneous graphs with heterophily have emerged as a powerful abstraction for modeling complex real-world systems, where nodes of different types and labels interact in diverse and often non-homophilous ways. Despite recent advances, robust representation learning for such graphs remains largely unexplored, particularly in the presence of noisy or misleading connectivity. In this work, we investigate this problem and identify structural noise as a critical challenge that significantly degrades model performance. To address this issue, we propose a unified framework, Heterogeneous Graph Unified Learning (HGUL), which jointly handles heterophily and noisy graph structures. The framework consists of three complementary modules: a kNN-based graph construction module that recovers reliable local neighborhoods, a graph structure learning module that adaptively refines the adjacency by filtering noisy edges, and a heterogeneous affinity learning module that captures class-level relationships via an extended affinity matrix derived from a polynomial graph kernel. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that HGUL consistently outperforms existing methods on clean graphs and maintains strong robustness under varying levels of structural noise. The results further underscore the importance of jointly modeling heterophily and noise in heterogeneous graph learning.
2604.27387.paper_summary_zh: 異質圖與異質性已成為建模複雜現實系統的強大抽象，其中不同類型和標籤的節點以多樣且通常非同質的方式互動。儘管最近有所進展，但對於這類圖的穩健表示學習仍然在很大程度上未被探索，特別是在存在噪聲或誤導性連接的情況下。在這項工作中，我們探討了這個問題，並確定結構噪聲是一個關鍵挑戰，顯著降低了模型性能。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個統一框架，異質圖統一學習（HGUL），該框架共同處理異質性和噪聲圖結構。該框架由三個互補模塊組成：一個基於kNN的圖構建模塊，用於恢復可靠的局部鄰域，一個圖結構學習模塊，通過過濾噪聲邊來自適應地細化鄰接矩陣，以及一個異質親和學習模塊，通過從多項式圖核推導的擴展親和矩陣捕捉類別級關係。在多個數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，HGUL在乾淨圖上始終優於現有方法，並在不同水平的結構噪聲下保持強大的穩健性。結果進一步強調了在異質圖學習中共同建模異質性和噪聲的重要性。
2604.27387.author: Yihan Zhang et.al.
